event_tagline: Harvard faculty, hands-on device demos, and a revenue plan tailored to your practice.
hero_headline: Grow Your Practice. We'll Show You How.
hero_tagline: Harvard faculty, hands-on device demos, and a revenue plan tailored to your practice.
event_description: A full-day clinical education event with Harvard faculty, hands-on device demos, a personalized revenue workshop, and an evening cocktail party with DJ.

agenda.title: Doors Open & Breakfast
agenda.description: Coffee, catered breakfast, and hands-on product stations — no opening lecture, just walk the floor and try the devices

agenda.title: Key Opinion Leader Clinical Keynote
agenda.description: Harvard faculty presents published outcomes data and clinical best practices across the BTL platform portfolio

agenda.title: Specialty Breakout Sessions
agenda.description: Small-group sessions organized by specialty — live device demonstrations, physician Q&A, and clinical deep dives

agenda.title: Lunch & Device Playground
agenda.description: Catered lunch and open floor — try every device, talk to clinical specialists, get your questions answered one-on-one

agenda.title: Revenue & Launch Workshop
agenda.description: Pricing strategies, staff training models, and patient marketing playbooks from practices already running BTL devices

agenda.title: One-on-One ROI Modeling
agenda.description: A BTL revenue specialist builds a custom financial model for your practice — patient volume, pricing, break-even timeline

agenda.title: Free Time
agenda.description: Break before the evening — explore Detroit, relax at the hotel, or continue conversations from the day

agenda.title: Cocktail Hour
agenda.description: Open bar, hors d'oeuvres, and networking with fellow practitioners and BTL clinical team

agenda.title: Dinner & Party
agenda.description: Sit-down dinner, live DJ, and dancing until midnight at the Westin Book Cadillac

chiro.name: Chiropractors
chiro.headline: Add a new revenue stream to your chiropractic practice
chiro.subheadline: Emsella and Emsculpt Neo bring a new patient demographic — women 35-65 — through your door for treatments that complement your core services.

testimonial.quote: We added Emsella six months ago. It's our highest-margin service and the patients are completely different from our adjustment patients. 80% are women who had never visited a chiropractor before.
testimonial.author: Dr. Brian Kowalski

talking_points: New revenue stream — no insurance billing headaches
Emsella treats urinary incontinence (68% improvement at 6 months)
Emsculpt Neo: 25% more muscle, 30% less fat in 30-minute sessions
Patients stay fully clothed during Emsella — zero procedure room setup
New patient demographic that cross-refers to your core services

medspa.name: Medical Spas
medspa.headline: The full aesthetics portfolio your clients already expect
medspa.subheadline: Emface, Exion, Emsculpt Neo, and Emtone give you head-to-toe coverage from one manufacturer — body contouring, skin tightening, facial rejuvenation, and cellulite treatment.

testimonial.quote: Our clients were asking for body contouring by name. Adding the BTL line meant we could say yes to everything — face, body, skin — without juggling four different vendor relationships.
testimonial.author: Dr. Natalie Voss

talking_points: Emface: 20-minute facial treatments, no needles, no downtime
Exion: microneedling RF + body contouring from one platform
Emsculpt Neo: HIFEM + RF — muscle and fat in one session
Emtone: RF + targeted pressure energy for cellulite
Single vendor relationship for service, training, and parts

derm.name: Dermatologists
derm.headline: Expand beyond injectables — skin, cellulite, and facial contouring
derm.subheadline: Exion, Emtone, and Emface let you treat what fillers and toxins can't. Offer your patients comprehensive skin and body rejuvenation from the same chair.

testimonial.quote: My Botox and filler patients kept asking about skin tightening and body work. Exion and Emface let me offer those treatments in-house instead of sending patients down the street.
testimonial.author: Dr. Karen Whitfield
testimonial.practice: Michigan Dermatology & Skin Center, Ann Arbor MI

talking_points: Exion Clear RF: smart microablation for skin resurfacing
Exion Fractional RF: microneedling with real-time impedance monitoring
Emface: synchronized RF + HIFES for facial lifting and wrinkle reduction
Emtone: cellulite treatment your patients have been asking about
All treatments complement (not compete with) your injectable practice

plastic-surgery.name: Plastic Surgeons
plastic-surgery.headline: Non-surgical revenue between procedures
plastic-surgery.subheadline: Emsculpt Neo and Emface serve the patients who want improvement but aren't ready for surgery — and the post-op patients who want to maintain results.

testimonial.quote: Emsculpt Neo fills the gap between consultation and procedure. Patients who aren't ready for lipo get real results — and 30% of them book surgery within a year.
testimonial.author: Dr. Steven Radford
testimonial.practice: Bloomfield Plastic Surgery, Bloomfield Hills MI

talking_points: Emsculpt Neo: 25% muscle growth + 30% fat reduction, no anesthesia
Emface: non-invasive facial contouring for patients who want subtle improvement
Staff-administered — doesn't require physician time per treatment
Builds patient relationships during the pre-surgical consideration phase
87% patient satisfaction rate across published studies

family-practice.name: Family Practitioners
family-practice.headline: A new revenue stream with minimal overhead and zero specialty training
family-practice.subheadline: Emsella and Emsculpt Neo are staff-administered, require no specialized certification, and address conditions your patients already mention — incontinence and core weakness.

testimonial.quote: My nurses run the Emsella treatments between patient visits. We added it as a wellness service — no insurance coding required. It paid for itself in four months.
testimonial.author: Dr. Michelle Pryor
testimonial.practice: Lakeside Family Medicine, Grosse Pointe MI

talking_points: Emsella: patients stay fully clothed, 30-minute sessions, zero downtime
68% improvement in urinary incontinence at 6 months
Emsculpt Neo: 30-minute body contouring, FDA-cleared for 10 body areas
Staff-administered — MA or nurse operates the device
New revenue stream fits alongside your insurance-based practice

ortho.name: Orthopedic Surgeons
ortho.headline: Pain management and muscle rehabilitation from one platform
ortho.subheadline: Emvital targets joint and spine pain. Emsculpt Neo rebuilds muscle for post-surgical and post-injury patients. Together, they extend your treatment options beyond the OR.

testimonial.quote: Post-knee replacement patients who did Emsculpt Neo recovered measurably faster. We tracked quad strength at 6 weeks — the treatment group was 35% ahead of controls.
testimonial.author: Dr. Mark Jankowski
testimonial.practice: Michigan Orthopedic & Sports Medicine, Royal Oak MI

talking_points: Emvital: targeted pain relief and mobility improvement for joints and spine
Emsculpt Neo: muscle rebuilding for post-surgical rehabilitation
Published data: 25% increase in muscle mass in treated areas
Non-pharmacological pain management option for chronic patients
Complements physical therapy — accelerates recovery timelines

cosmetic-dentist.name: Cosmetic Dentists
cosmetic-dentist.headline: TMJ treatment and facial aesthetics — a natural extension of your dental practice
cosmetic-dentist.subheadline: Emface is FDA-cleared for TMJ dysfunction and facial contouring. Your patients already trust you with their face. Now you can treat the muscles and skin around it.

testimonial.quote: Half my TMJ patients had tried everything — night guards, Botox, physical therapy. Emface gave them measurable relief, and they started referring friends for the aesthetic treatments.
testimonial.author: Dr. Jennifer Haddad
testimonial.practice: Rochester Hills Cosmetic Dentistry, Rochester Hills MI

talking_points: FDA-cleared for TMJ dysfunction — treats the condition your patients already have
Facial contouring and wrinkle reduction without needles or downtime
20-minute sessions, 4 treatments — fits between dental appointments
Your patients already associate your practice with facial care
New service that diversifies revenue beyond dental insurance

psychiatry.name: Psychiatrists
psychiatry.headline: FDA-cleared TMS for treatment-resistant depression — drug-free, under 30 minutes
psychiatry.subheadline: EXOMIND uses patented ExoTMS technology to treat Major Depressive Disorder. Noninvasive, operator-independent, and produces results in as few as six sessions.

testimonial.quote: For patients who've failed two or more medications, EXOMIND is the first thing that's worked. Six sessions in, I see changes in affect and engagement that medication adjustments never achieved.
testimonial.author: Dr. Aaron Greenberg

talking_points: FDA-cleared for Major Depressive Disorder in adults
Patented ExoTMS (Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation) technology
Drug-free and noninvasive — walk-in, walk-out sessions under 30 minutes
Results in as few as six treatments
Operator-independent — staff can administer after brief training

emsculpt-neo.name: Emsculpt Neo
emsculpt-neo.description: Simultaneous HIFEM + synchronized RF for muscle building and fat elimination. FDA-cleared for 10 body areas. 50+ publications supporting HIFEM technology.

emsella.name: Emsella
emsella.description: HIFEM technology for pelvic floor rehabilitation. 3x more effective than electrical muscle stimulation. Six treatments, no downtime, patients remain fully clothed.

emface.name: Emface
emface.description: Synchronized RF + HIFES muscle stimulation for facial contouring and wrinkle reduction. FDA-cleared for wrinkles, TMJ dysfunction, and submental laxity.

exion.name: Exion
exion.description: Clear RF (smart microablation), Fractional RF (microneedling), Face (RF + HA stimulation), and Body (contouring). Head-to-toe coverage from one platform.

emtone.name: Emtone
emtone.description: RF + targeted pressure energy for cellulite reduction. Similar to a hot stone massage with intense mechanical vibrations. Four treatments, 20 minutes each.

emvital.name: Emvital
emvital.description: Pain management, mobility improvement, and injury treatment. Targets joints and spine specialists, pain management centers.

exomind.name: EXOMIND
exomind.description: Patented ExoTMS technology (Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation) for Major Depressive Disorder. Noninvasive, operator-independent, walk-in and walk-out sessions.

faq.question: Will there be pressure to buy something at this event?
faq.answer: No. There are no contracts, deposits, or purchase commitments at the event. You'll see clinical data, try the devices, and talk to physicians who use them. If you want to explore further, your BTL rep will schedule a separate follow-up at your practice on your timeline.

faq.question: Do I need to hire additional staff to operate BTL devices?
faq.answer: Most practices use existing clinical staff. BTL devices are designed to be operator-independent — your MAs, nurses, or techs can run treatments after a brief training program included with every device. You don't need a physician present for each session.

faq.question: What does the financing look like?
faq.answer: BTL offers several financing structures and your rep will walk through the options at a follow-up meeting. At the event, the clinical specialists will help you model patient volume and pricing for your market so you can evaluate break-even timelines before any financial conversation.

faq.question: Who else will be there — practice owners or sales reps?
faq.answer: Practice owners, medical directors, and office managers. The event is capped at 75 to keep it intimate. You'll be in a room with other local practitioners evaluating the same decision, plus physicians who already run BTL devices in their clinics.

faq.question: Which of my current patients are candidates for these treatments?
faq.answer: That depends on your specialty and the device — the clinical sessions cover patient selection criteria for each platform. Broadly: Emsculpt Neo and Emtone serve body contouring patients, Emsella targets pelvic health (women 35-65 especially), Emface covers facial aesthetics and TMJ, and EXOMIND treats depression. Your specialty page has more detail.

faq.question: I've been to device dinners before. Why is this one different?
faq.answer: Three things. First, a Harvard Key Opinion Leader presents the clinical data — published outcomes, not marketing material. Second, you get hands-on time with every device, not just a slide deck. Third, a BTL revenue specialist builds a custom financial model for your practice based on your patient volume and market rates. Plus, the evening party is genuinely fun.

faq.question: Do I have to stay the full day?
faq.answer: You're welcome to come for any portion that fits your schedule. The morning clinical sessions and afternoon revenue workshop are the highest-value blocks. The evening cocktail party and dinner with DJ are optional — but most people stay.

faq.question: What about parking and hotel accommodations?
faq.answer: The Westin Book Cadillac has valet and self-parking available. If you're coming from outside metro Detroit and want to stay overnight, we've arranged a room block at the Westin — details will be in your confirmation email after registration.

faq.question: Can I bring my office manager or a colleague?
faq.answer: Yes — and you should, especially if they handle equipment decisions or patient scheduling. Each person needs their own registration for capacity planning. After you register, you'll get a share link to send them.

faq.question: What if I register but can't make it?
faq.answer: No problem. We'll schedule a private demonstration at your practice instead, or connect you with the next event in your area.

post_event.lead_magnet_description: A 12-page guide covering device selection, treatment room setup, staff training timelines, patient pricing strategies, and first-year ROI projections for each BTL platform.
